message: The sky...
It was there when I awoke.
There was something I needed to do first...
Organize my memory.
It's become a habit because of the way I live.
"You finally waking up?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki...?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't worry. It's just me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Not that I really care, but lately you've been showing up every day."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so. I didn't see you for a few weeks before, too. Well, it's gotta be because I'm about to be isolated. Maybe I should be thankful for this chance..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's just a pain in the ass if you ask me."
Yuki just smiled back at me as if she hadn't heard what I just said.

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you grinning for? You're creeping me out..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing."
Yuki laughed and looked up to the sky.
What's up with her?

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "The blue sky is nice too, isn't it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "...Huh? What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's nice seeing the great blue sky spread out overhead, stretching into the distance..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's with you, all of a sudden..."

name: Yuki
message: "All of a sudden, huh? You know, I've been thinking a lot while I was away, and I've been experiencing a lot of new things."

name: Tomosane
message: "What about it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh nothing... It's not so bad sitting under the blue sky and looking at your dumb face. Just the two of us, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "My dumb face? Why, you little..."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't get mad at me... You showed up a while ago, but for a long time you were just sleeping there next to me."

name: Tomosane
message: "I did? I was sleeping? I-Is that possible?"
Normally, while we're sleeping... or rather, while we're not conscious, we can't see each other.
Being unconscious is the same as not existing.
Or so I thought...

name: Yuki
message: "It's the first time I've seen it happen, too. Until now, we've always disappeared any time we were sleeping, so we couldn't see each other."

name: Yuki
message: "It... might be another sign that a big change is happening."

name: Tomosane
message: "An omen, huh..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, either way, I had fun watching you sleep."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're such a freak... You really think it's fun watching someone sleep?"

name: Yuki
message: "It was fun. I've never seen your sleeping face before... I was really happy."

name: Tomosane
message: "Anyway, don't do that again."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, now, I don't know if I can promise that..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up! If it happens again, wake me up!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahahaha... That would be such a waste."

name: Tomosane
message: "The hell are you talking about?"
Yuki looked a little troubled, but she still laughed.
I hadn't seen her wear this expression very often.
It left me a bit confused.

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What are you laughing at..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ehehe... Oh, nothing..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's not important. Anyway, it's really a pain losing memories left and right like this... It's like getting carried off somewhere while you're sleeping."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... Maybe this is how sleepwalkers feel."

name: Yuki
message: "It's way worse than just sleepwalking... Someone else is controlling your body while you're sleeping."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. Sometimes we overlap, though, like we are now... So what were you doing on the rooftop?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's kinda like... You remember that girl who came up here yesterday?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yesterday... Oh, Takashima?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, she came here again today."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm, I see... Well, not like I care."

name: Yuki
message: "You're the one who asked. You should care!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you friends with her? She's kinda gloomy..."

name: Yuki
message: "She's not that gloomy. I just met her yesterday, though... I didn't even know her name."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's probably because of the holes in your memory... Well, putting that aside, that's two days in a row we've come across Takashima up here. What's that mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe it's a coincidence?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I don't think so. I've been staking out this area for quite a while yet I've never seen her come here."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh... Then I wonder what it could be..."
The answer was simple. That woman was interested in Yuki... Interested in her as a member of the opposite sex.
Minakami Yuki's personality would definitely endear her to a girl like that.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Hasaki-chan?"
Hasaki stared at us.

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, is that you, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, yeah... Sorry, am I in the way? I'll just disappear..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Can you really disappear at will? That would be really convenient."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha... Nope, not really."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, Tomo Nii-san, you're there too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is that a problem?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Not at all... I came to see you, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, so I really am in the way?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, not at all.
I'm really glad to see you more often, Yuki-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? That's nice to hear...
but wouldn't it be better if I left you alone with Tomosane?"

name: Hasaki
message: "N-No, no, not at all! Not at all!"

name: Yuki
message: "If you say so... Oh, did you pack him lunch?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, yeah, I came to bring Tomo Nii-san his lunchbox."

name: Tomosane
message: "How many times do I have to tell you? I can just buy bread, so I don't need you to make me lunch... Besides, it's Saturday. And don't call me Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Hasaki
message: "It doesn't matter if it's Saturday. I'm not gonna be home today, so you'll need something to eat."

name: Hasaki
message: "And there's no nutritional value in bread. It doesn't have anything but carbs, fat, sugar, and salt in it."

name: Yuki
message: "She's right. Come on Tomo, you should be happy your cute little sister made it for you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you calling me Tomo..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's just a nickname. Don't worry about every little detail."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't make up nicknames for me... Jeez."
Damn her... It's bad enough that Hasaki calls me Tomo Nii-san for some reason...

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm? What's this? Why are there two lunchboxes?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm going to be working at Hakushuu pretty late tonight, so I might not be able to make you dinner."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hakushuu? You're gonna be late tonight?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. I'm not really sure, but Master said it might take some time."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's that about? I didn't hear anything about that."

name: Hasaki
message: "He didn't call you too?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I'm not working today... He should've called me first if he was short on workers."

name: Hasaki
message: "Who knows? Maybe there are some jobs he doesn't think you can do?"
Jobs that Hasaki can do that I can't?
...Are there any jobs like that?
Well, not like I care. Either way, Hasaki will be working late tonight...
All right.
Good, good... So she's not gonna be home...

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"
Wh-What? She's glaring at me...

name: Hasaki
message: "You sure seem happy about something..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're hiding something."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What? Now you're accusing me of something..."

name: Yuki
message: "An accusation, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What's your problem, Yuki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... You must be happy because I'm not going to be in the house, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No way..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A-And besides, you shouldn't be walking around the school by yourself, Hasaki. You're not even a student here, you know..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You're dodging the question..."

name: Yuki
message: "Tomosane-kun, just what could you be getting up to when you have the house to yourself?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What are you trying to say?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing, but I am kind of curious why you're getting so worked up about this."

name: Tomosane
message: "I am not."

name: Yuki
message: "Liar. Your pulse is going up too. I wonder why that would happen."

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, that's just..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm, so you want to do something alone since I'm not going to be home..."

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, I don't... Stop making crap up, Yuki!"

name: Tomosane
message: "M-More importantly, you really shouldn't be hanging around at school anymore."

name: Hasaki
message: "You changed the subject again..."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I'm being serious."

name: Hasaki
message: "You don't need to worry about that. I'm making sure I don't stand out."

name: Tomosane
message: "How do you not stand out? You're carrying that rabbit doll around..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I hide it."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's too big to hide..."

name: Yuki
message: "It'll be fine. It's never been a problem before."

name: Tomosane
message: "But... I'm a problem child, and Hasaki is related to me. Everyone just pretends to have not seen her."

name: Yuki
message: "Which means it's not a problem, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course there's a problem."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh right, your rabbit has gotten pretty beaten up, hasn't it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "Let me see... I can do something about that..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ah, Tomosane, grab the sewing kit out of my bag."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's the same whether I do it or you do!"

name: Yuki
message: "Just play along... Look, it's in that small pouch there. See it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You actually carry this around with you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't worry about it. Now, where's the white thread... Here it is."
Yuki fixed the frayed spots on Hasaki's doll... She's really talented. Even I can't deny it...

name: Tomosane
message: "You can sew too?"

name: Yuki
message: "So can you. You've just never tried it... It's one of the skills this body had to begin with."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah... Nii-san could sew too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now that I think of it, Mamiya Takuji made that doll for Hasaki, didn't he?"

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji-kun, huh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm? What's wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh, I guess so... This body's owner made the stuffed doll for her."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... He didn't have the money to buy it, so instead he went to the store every day and took measurements so he could make one of his own... He messed up the first few times he tried, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Rabbits are white, so it always looked like a squid when he messed up... The ears, hands, and legs all looked like tentacles. Ahaha."

name: Hasaki
message: "Back then... I really wanted that doll..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't imagine Mamiya Takuji doing that now."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji-kun, huh..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, nothing we can do about it now. This body's original soul believes he hurt Hasaki-chan and his mother, Kotomi-san, because he was too competent."

name: Tomosane
message: "His mother? She's the cause of this whole mess, isn't she?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah... I guess you could say Kotomi-san is the original cause..."

name: Yuki
message: "But... there was an incident that happened because he was too competent."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... I can hardly believe that Mamiya Takuji was good at anything."

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji Nii-san was... good at everything. Not just studying, but reading, art, and music too...
But..."

name: Tomosane
message: "But?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you know... The truth is that he destroyed everything because he was too competent. You can't say Kotomi-san was the only one at fault."

name: Yuki
message: "The original incident didn't happen because of any single person."

name: Yuki
message: "It happened because of a combination of factors."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki..."
The original incident...
In the end, it all comes down to that.
The reason his mother became an empty shell that only stares into space.
The reason the competent Mamiya Takuji became a weak, rebellious person.
And the reason Mamiya Takuji made separate personalities like me and Yuki within himself.
Apparently there was one incident that caused it all...
The reason I say 'apparently'... Well, this is kind of pathetic, but...
In truth, I don't know very much about it.
Of course, Hasaki knows everything, but I can't  really ask her about it.
That incident is the reason for everything.
It gave birth to this insane situation... and it's a memory that pains Hasaki to remember.
Not just Mamiya and his mother, but... after the incident, Hasaki too was mentally scarred for a long time.
No... Not just mentally, but physically scarred as well.
After the incident, Hasaki was hospitalized for a long time.
She spent several months in intensive care, and after that she was in a psychiatric hospital.
It left her with large scars.
After such a huge incident, do I really have the right to know everything that happened?
The reality is that I was born long after it happened. It has nothing to do with me.
Hasaki's darkest memories... Do I have the right to know about those?
I'm just someone who will disappear...
Like a person passing by on the street.
Does the personality named Yuuki Tomosane... have the right to know?
Yuki acts like she knows something about it, but I have no idea how much she actually knows.
I'm sure Yuki's personality was only born after the incident as well...
So neither of us know the truth...
All I know is that there was a single incident that caused the situation we have today.
After that incident, Mamiya Kotomi lost her mind, and Mamiya Takuji's mental state was severely altered... creating us.
Hasaki bore great scars.
In order to protect Hasaki...
And in order to create a new Mamiya Takuji...
I exist.

name: Yuki
message: "Why do you look so serious? Were you thinking about something?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I guess so... A lot of things, actually."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... Like I said, you should be grateful to your past self. The reason you're so strong in fights is because of the skills your body originally had."

name: Tomosane
message: "I've continued my training ever since then... It's not because of Mamiya Takuji's hard work."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I guess you have... That was back when he was just a brat."

name: Yuki
message: "I know you've been training with that faggot Master for a long time now... It's almost entirely thanks to you that I'm so strong."

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course it is... Mamiya didn't create everything."

name: Yuki
message: "Hahahaha... You really hate Mamiya Takuji, don't you, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "If he hadn't created me like that, I wouldn't want to kill him. I'm a blade he created to kill himself..."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm just a blade he created... Jeez, that's dark. Aren't you getting a bit carried away there, Tomosane?"

name: Tomosane
message: "...You're really annoying..."

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, it's painful just looking at you when you're trying to pretend to be all cool and dark."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not pretending to be cool!"

name: Yuki
message: "It wouldn't hurt... if once in a while you were thankful for the body you have. Thanks to him, you can fix up the bunny like this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm... And he was the one who created this whole bothersome situation."

name: Yuki
message: "That's true, but... I'm not the kind of person that's supposed to be in this world."

name: Tomosane
message: "Apparently if we go to a hospital, they can erase us one by one... They call those people counselors..."

name: Yuki
message: "What's up with that? Sounds scary!"

name: Tomosane
message: "There's a treatment for dissociative identity disorder that erases the personalities..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's how unnecessary our existence in this world is."

name: Yuki
message: "I can't deny that."

name: Hasaki
message: "You're wrong."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Thanks to Nii-san creating the two of you... we were able to meet..."

name: Hasaki
message: "If Takuji Nii-san hadn't accepted your existence, I would be truly alone."

name: Hasaki
message: "So when you say it's bothersome and stuff... that's kind of..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, whoa... D-Don't cry..."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa... Don't make your sister cry."

name: Tomosane
message: "You agreed with me! You said we were just a bother!"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't look at me..."

name: Tomosane
message: "B-But still... I can't forgive Mamiya Takuji for not giving up on his mother..."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, maybe so, but he's a kind person at heart. After all, he was originally going to be the savior and protect the world."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, do you have to talk about this..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I don't mind it anymore...
You shouldn't talk bad about people..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the primary victim here."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... That just means her brother isn't the only one who's kind. Maybe it runs in the family."

name: Tomosane
message: "In the Mamiya family, huh... Kind to a fault, perhaps."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahahahaha, Dad really was gentle... I guess."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I finished this while we were talking."

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Thank you!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah... I feel like I'm gonna disappear."

name: Hasaki
message: "Disappear?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki's personality is going to disappear... Not like I really care, but I'm surprised you can feel it coming on."

name: Yuki
message: "So you still can't feel it? You'll probably get better at it later."

name: Tomosane
message: "How am I supposed to get better..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san... Yuki-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, she's gone..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well it's not like she's gone forever... Don't make that face."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But some day..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Stop looking so sad... Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah... Sorry."
I ended up going to class.
Apparently attending class was my job this time.
If you ask me, one of the other two should be going to class and doing other boring stuff like that.
I especially don't want to waste my time going to class since I'm fated to disappear anyway.
But at least there aren't any afternoon classes on Saturday, so it's not all bad.
The meal Hasaki made me for lunch was gone too.
Apparently someone ate it that morning (either Mamiya Takuji or Yuki), since both the lunchboxes were empty.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... Hasaki's lunchboxes are way too small."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's still first period..."
I looked at the clock.
It was still pretty early.
I'm gonna be hungry before dinnertime...
And someone ate my dinner too...

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm pretty sure Hasaki said she would be home late today."
It's strange that Master would only call for Hasaki to work at Hakushuu.
Usually he calls me or Yuki when he needs someone to wash dishes or clean the shop.
Well... either way, Hasaki will be late.

name: Tomosane
message: "...It's been a while since I've been able to do that."
I hadn't done it in a while, so I had a lot of energy built up.
This was the first chance I'd had in a while...

name: Tomosane
message: "...That voice."
When I left the school building, I heard them talking.
In the rear courtyard...
I could only hear a few words, like "finish it" and "let's go," but I could tell right away what they were doing.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I want to just ignore them and go home, but..."
I hopped over the fence.

name: Iida
message: "Huh?"

name: Nishimura
message: "No way..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "M-Mamiya... kun."
My perceptions aren't altered like Takuji and Yuki's are.
I heard their words exactly as they said them. "Takuji," not "Yuuki" or "Tomosane."
Which just means that my perceptions don't need to keep secrets from me.
Well, I'm glad I don't have to deal with that crap.

name: Nishimura
message: "Wh-What's up?"
He's shitting bricks...
That can only mean one thing. Bingo...
They were hiding and whispering about something... These guys are a pain.

name: Tomosane
message: "Nah, nothing in particular. Do I need to have something in particular to talk about? If you'd like, I could make a problem for you right now."

name: Iida
message: "Oh, no."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just now, you guys were talking about going somewhere, weren't you?"

name: Nishimura
message: "Oh, uh, not at all."

name: Nishimura
message: "G-Guh..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Ah!"

name: Iida
message: "Eek!"

name: Tomosane
message: "And I heard you were going to 'finish' something..."
When I punched Nishimura, the other two winced in fear.
They bullied Mamiya Takuji so much, but they rolled over like dogs once I beat them up a few times.
They're weak... That's the only way to describe them.

name: Tomosane
message: "So? What were you talking about?"

name: Iida
message: "S-Sorry! Uh, we were, uh, looking for you, Mamiya-kun."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm. Looking for me, huh?"

name: Iida
message: "Uh, well. We got some good stuff... We thought maybe you'd wanna get in on it too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Good stuff?"

name: Iida
message: "Yeah, yeah, good ice."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... Some good ice, huh?"

name: Iida
message: "It was really expensive. The crystals are pure white."

name: Tomosane
message: "Pure white crystals..."
"Ice" is a euphemism for meth.
They also call it "S," "Tina," or "glass." There are a lot of nicknames.
I didn't care to know, but I learned a lot of dumb shit like that hanging out with these guys.
They call it a white powder, but... most of it doesn't really look like white powder. At least, I've never seen any like that.
Apparently it's colorless and transparent if the purity is high, but the kind of stuff that gets sold in the city isn't white because of the impurities.
The color changes depending on the impurities. It can even be yellow or pink...
Most drugs go through quite a few different hands before they reach the individual sellers. The adulteration happens as it passes through all those different hands.
And to dilute the water even more, the end sellers cut the drugs before they sell them.
Apparently they add anything they have at hand that looks like white powder, even though they have no scientific knowledge about the drugs.
Sugar, salt... sometimes even chalk is mixed in.
Apparently it burns like crazy if you add sugar.
I've heard stories of people whose meth exploded when they lit up, getting in their eyes and everything... That happens when their meth is cut with salt.
And sometimes even poison is mixed in.
If it's cut with a lethal poison, they call it a Terror Hit.
And if the adulterant just gives you some side effects, they call it a bad trip.
But it's apparently not very common for meth to be cut with actual poison.
Meth is one of the tools of the trade for a lot of people in the business, so anyone who sells meth cut with anything poisonous might be "disciplined" to control the quality of the market.
Because of that "discipline," the quality is fairly high.
I don't know if that's a good thing or a bad thing.
The only reason I learned all this stuff is because I hang out with these guys.

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh really... Good ice, huh?"

name: Iida
message: "Y-Yeah."

name: Tomosane
message: "...Give it all to me."

name: Iida
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You were planning on doing it without me, weren't you? I told you to give me all of it. Didn't you hear me?"

name: Iida
message: "B-But!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "H-Hey..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm? What? Shiroyama..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Oh, uh... Nothing."
The flame of resistance flared up in Shiroyama's eyes for a moment...
But once he met my eyes that flame disappeared.
He had the most backbone of all these losers, but now look at him.

name: Tomosane
message: "What is it, Shiroyama? If you have something to say, look me in the eyes and say it."

name: Shiroyama
message: "I-I didn't say anything..."
Well, after I hurt him that bad... I don't blame him.
The first time I met him, I beat him bloody... and I've nearly killed him on a few other occasions too.
Because he tried to get revenge on me several times.
Though he failed every time...
He tried to jump me in a back alley once too.
Even an amateur doesn't give many opportunities to get ambushed, though. People are instinctively wary of walking through dark and deserted places.
Unless they were drunk, anyone would notice footsteps behind them in the dark.
And I'm more careful about listen for footsteps behind me than most people.
If the footsteps slow down when I do, I can tell... That alone is enough to stop them from ambushing me.
Maybe it would be different if they could fly or something... A stun gun or something wouldn't matter, though.
I've seen Shiroyama break someone's leg without hesitation before.
And there was one time when he got a bunch of people together and surrounded me late at night.
But there were less than ten people.
They had knives and stun guns.
It was a pretty good plan on his part. Even a dumbass could think of something like that, though.
Of course, I ran away at full speed... It would be retarded to fight them head on.
I was confident in my running speed. It's not my arms but my legs that make me strong in battle.
They slowly split up... They were too focused on chasing me so they didn't even notice that they weren't moving together.
I turned and butchered the closest man.
I hit him with my entire body weight, knocking him out in a single blow.
I picked up his knife and threw it at the second guy.
He probably didn't expect me to throw it.
He fell on his ass right there.
I put my boot in his face, since he'd offered so nicely.
I felt the unique sensation of teeth breaking under my heel.
I got a metal pipe from him.
In reality, a metal pipe is a far better weapon than a knife or a stun gun.
The length is more important than the lethality of the weapon.
I used my new weapon to take out my pursuers one by one.
In the end, it was four versus one... I wouldn't lose to four amateurs even without a weapon.
The end result was a one-sided beatdown that was even more brutal than usual.
I stabbed a knife through Shiroyama's right hand to teach him a lesson.
I stabbed Numada right in the ass as he tried to run.
That was the last time Shiroyama tried to resist...
After that, he devolved into a man who only fears me.
Well, part of that is because I hurt him so badly... but that was his own fault.
He did something disgusting to my body, even if was Mamiya Takuji's personality at the time... I couldn't hurt him enough to pay him back for that.

name: Tomosane
message: "Is this everything?"

name: Iida
message: "Y-Yes..."
He gave me one packet of the stuff.
It didn't look like enough for them all.
I made them empty their pockets and searched their stuff, but I couldn't find anything.

name: Iida
message: "So... are you done?"

name: Tomosane
message: "...Yeah."
Numada turned to run.

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey! Numada!"

name: Iida
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Take off... your shoes."

name: Iida
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Do it already!"
I made him take off his shoes right there.
He was walking funny.
Like he was protecting something.
I checked out his shoes, but there was nothing in them.

name: Iida
message: "Th-There's nothing there, right?"
I rolled up the cuffs on his pants.
There was an unusual bulge in one of his socks.

name: Tomosane
message: "...What is this?"
I punched him, but not hard enough to hurt my hand.
I got three more packets from Numada's socks.
Three packets of white powder... Naturally, they were more packets of drugs.

name: Tomosane
message: "You have quite a lot of this stuff, huh?"

name: Iida
message: "Ahahaha... We really splurged this time."
Numada laughed weakly.
The blood poured out of his nose.
Splurged, huh? For this powder...

name: Tomosane
message: "Well then, I'll be confiscating this."

name: Iida
message: "Huh? Wh-What?"
Numada tried to say something, but I was already leaving.
At the current prices, each of these 0.3g packets would sell to the end consumer for over 10,000 yen each... Put together, there was easily over 30,000 yen worth.
I couldn't complain about that.
I flushed the toilet in the smelly bathroom stall.
The packets all went down the toilet along with the water.
It was hard to flush the unopened packets since they had air in them.
I finally got them to flush along with some toilet paper.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... These public restrooms always smell like shit."
I disposed of the drugs I took from Numada and Shiroyama in a nearby restroom.
It was only natural.
I wouldn't want to get stopped by the police while I had that stuff in my pockets.
I always get rid of any drugs I confiscate right away.
I'm only taking it from them to cause them pain... not to use it myself.
I never planned to use any of the drugs myself.
I can tell there's already something wrong with Mamiya Takuji's brain. I don't even want to imagine what would happen if I started doing drugs too.
I used to take them home and throw them away in the garbage at my house, but lately I've been getting rid of them as soon as I can.
Anyway, I'm bullying them as much as I can.
I'm taking my revenge on them before I disappear.
Did I... imagine that?
Oh well...
I should get going...
I knew it...
He's not an amateur...
I felt a bit uneasy... and I was sure of it by the time I went into the station in Suginomiya.

name: Tomosane
message: "...I let my guard down because there are so many people in Suginomiya."
This is probably because I've been targeted by Shiroyama and his thugs so many times.
I can always tell when someone's watching me... It's just a matter of practice.
I dashed into a side road, like I was running away...
Then I turned and stopped just around the corner.
And waited...
A man quickly followed me around the corner.
It was a street just off the main road, and no one else was around.
Because of that it ended up being just the two of us staring at each other in an alley.
My pursuer froze for a moment and then looked away.
Which means he's not a cop...
Though I suppose a cop wouldn't trail me like this.
A cop would've stopped me when I went in the restroom, or right after I came out.
My pursuer tried to walk away with a calm gait that was obviously feigned.
But...

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey... do you think I'm just gonna let you walk away?"
"Huh? Um, what do you mean?"
"E-Eek! A kn-knife?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Bingo..."
I cut open the bottom of his bag, and a camera fell to the ground.

name: Tomosane
message: "What's this big camera for? Not like you can go birdwatching here in the city..."
"Oh, no... I'm a paparazzo. I just got back from my favorite idol's concert..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So what do you do with those ugly sunglasses? Go peeping through the window?"
It was hard to see through his long hair, but his sunglasses had unusually thick frames.
Sunglasses with a built-in camera... The kind detectives and the like use...

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you, a detective? Who hired you?"
"Hahahaha... Um."
"Huh?!"
"Guh!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You think I'm gonna let you run?"
I locked his arms behind his back and pushed him to the ground.
I could break both his arms if I put my body weight on him and bent his arms just a few more inches.
"O-Ow, ow ow ow!!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who are you... Why are you following me?"
"S-Sorry! I'm a photographer... I do landscape pictur― ah, ow, ow, ow, oww!!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You weren't looking at the scenery... You were following me."
"A-Ahahaha..."
I looked through the rest of his belongings.
I found a notebook.
I thought he was a detective or something at first, but I knew he wasn't when I saw that notebook.

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you a reporter? For a newspaper? No, this employment card says it's a magazine... Your name is Kimura Nobukatsu, is it?"

name: Kimura
message: "A-Ahahaha..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So what were you looking for, Kimura-san?"

name: Kimura
message: "Oh, uh... I was writing about today's youth culture..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You mean you were investigating drug addiction, right?"

name: Kimura
message: "Uh, um..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Bullseye, huh..."

name: Kimura
message: "Ah, ahahaha... Umm..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll be confiscating this camera."

name: Kimura
message: "N-No way... H-How about you just delete the pictures?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm sure you can restore them."

name: Kimura
message: "A-All right! Then just take the memory card!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmm... Well, okay..."
I let go of his arms...

name: Kimura
message: "Haa... I knew you were strong from when I scoped you out, but that's amazing. You must have experience with martial arts."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, you want to interview me now that you lost your pictures?"

name: Kimura
message: "Hahahaha, don't say that. After investigating you, I have to say I'm incredibly interested in you personally."

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you trying to butter me up? Don't you think something like that is just gonna tick me off?"

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wait a second. Sorry, sorry."

name: Kimura
message: "I was serious. Your actions are really mysterious..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Do you have a death wish?"

name: Kimura
message: "W-Wait! At least let me say this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Say what?"

name: Kimura
message: "Why did you throw away the drugs you took from them?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You little bastard. How do you know that?"

name: Kimura
message: "Hey, no, wait, don't get mad... It doesn't hurt you, though, does it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "You haven't done any of the drugs."

name: Kimura
message: "There wasn't a single empty packet. All of them still had the drugs in them, and you just threw them away..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Exactly how long have you been following me?"

name: Kimura
message: "Um, I just happened to see it."

name: Tomosane
message: "You just happened to see it while you were going through my garbage?"

name: Kimura
message: "And you tried flushing them down the toilet, but they didn't all flush. Those air-filled packets don't flush very well since they float."

name: Tomosane
message: "You searched my toilet?"

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, you go to the toilet every time you get any drugs... At first, I thought you were doing the drugs in there, but then I discovered a packet that didn't flush."

name: Kimura
message: "Since then, I've been using a plunger to investigate what you flushed."

name: Kimura
message: "I recovered quite a lot of them."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really now..."

name: Kimura
message: "Yeah, that's why I was curious. I wanted to know why you would do that after going through all that trouble to get those expensive drugs."

name: Tomosane
message: "All right... I understand."

name: Kimura
message: "You understand?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it looks like you know too much..."

name: Kimura
message: "Wh-What? Wait... did I say too much?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, way too much..."

name: Kimura
message: "U-Um, your face is really scary... You're not thinking of killing me, are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's the plan."

name: Kimura
message: "Eek!"

name: Kimura
message: "Aaah! My SLR!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Also, this thing looks ridiculous."

name: Kimura
message: "Not my camera sunglasses!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't come near me ever again."

name: Kimura
message: "U-Ugh... You show no mercy..."

name: Tomosane
message: "If I ever see you again, you're dead."

name: Kimura
message: "Okay... Understood."
Kimura's wristwatch flashed bright like a flashlight.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
The light was seared into my retinas.

name: Tomosane
message: "Tch... He still had another camera, huh..."
He looked like a fool, but I'm sure there's a reason why he was investigating me.

name: Tomosane
message: "Kimura Nobukatsu, huh? I should be careful from now on. He's dangerous..."
If I see Yuki, I should warn her too.

name: Tomosane
message: "And Mamiya... Nah, forget about him..."
Mamiya is in the most danger, but I can't just go and warn him about every little thing.

name: Tomosane
message: "Either way, from now on I should only confiscate money from those guys, not drugs."
Taking their drugs away causes more psychological damage since it's so much harder for them to get, but I don't have much of a choice anymore.

name: Tomosane
message: "Personally, I don't give a shit if I get caught, but I don't want to drag Yuki down with me."
If Yuki got caught, Hasaki would be upset.
And that's the last thing I want to happen.

name: Tomosane
message: "Puhaa..."
I drank a can of tea I had in the fridge to calm myself down.
The cold tea pricked at the back of my throat and made my head hurt.
But to me, even that pain felt good...

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... That helped cool my head a bit..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I haven't had one of these in a while."
I opened the top on a cup of ramen.
A lot of crap happened, so it took longer than I expected to get home.
The sun was already setting... It wasn't dinner time yet, but I made myself some ramen anyway.
It was salty.
Well, the taste doesn't really matter.

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, it's boiling..."
I came back into the kitchen and poured the kettle of boiling water into my ramen.
I looked at the clock.
It was already after five...
Hasaki still wouldn't be home for a while.
She said she would be working at Hakushuu late tonight. Her job there usually ends around ten o'clock.
If I include the time she'll spend walking home, it'll be more than 5 hours until she gets home.
A little giggle found its way out of my mouth.
No one will be in this house for quite a while...
I'm alone in this house...

name: Tomosane
message: "...It's been a while."
Maybe I can do that again...
Hasaki won't be home for...

name: Tomosane
message: "I can..."
I put in the CD I bought.
My heart rate increased...

name: Tomosane
message: "...Heh. This isn't like me."
The video game started up.
I can play video games.
When I'm alone, I can play games without worrying.

name: Tomosane
message: "Heh... Hehehe!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I haven't heard this sound in a long time..."
I'm not an egghead like Yuki, who always comes home and immediately sits down to a book.
I only read books to kill time when I have nothing else to do.
Games are way better than books! If I could, I'd like to play handheld games when I'm at school.
I've actually tried bringing handheld games to school before.
But whenever I went to play them...
The batteries were dead.

name: Tomosane
message: "That's probably... No, that's definitely because Mamiya found the games and played them until the battery died."

name: Tomosane
message: "I did it dozens of times too, but I never got to play any of the games... God damn it!"
That bastard... Every time I charge it up so that I can play games, he always plays them for hours on end before I even get a chance to try.
At this point, I'm pretty sure he's doing that on purpose to bug me.
Whenever I finish charging the handheld and excitedly put it into my bag, my consciousness blacks out...

name: Tomosane
message: "And then before I know it, the batteries are dead!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Every time I feel that desperation, it makes me want to kill that bastard..."
I must be destined to hate every single thing about Mamiya Takuji.
For the record, Mamiya Takuji actually owns a lot of games, but most of them aren't the kind of stuff I play.
Most of them are so-called galge, which I'm really not interested in.
Though I guess he does have a few games that I do like.
I just don't really feel like playing any of them, though.
I mean, why would I?
He always pirates his games online instead of buying them.
I can't stand that... It bothers me so much I want to kill him for it.
Not that I'm someone who should be giving a lecture on morals...
I just instinctively hate him.

name: Tomosane
message: "Apparently I find every single thing he does irritating... He's such a pain in the ass."
It seems like Yuki doesn't hate Mamiya, but I really don't understand why.
Someone like him might as well just die.
There aren't very many things in this world I hate as much as him.
There's not a single good thing about him.
Either way, I can't play games at school.
And I can't play games in the house either...
Especially not console games that use the TV.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki will be at Hakushuukyou all night. She said her shift would last until late tonight..."
Which means I can play games today without worrying about anything.
If Hasaki ever sees me in the living room, she always shows interest in what I'm doing.
She always comes and bothers me.
Which is why I can't play games when she's around.

name: Tomosane
message: "Whatever... Let's have some fun tonight. It sure has been a while..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'm home."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, Tomo Nii-san, there you are. I thought you weren't around because you didn't respond."
Why...
Why is she home so early?
Didn't she say she was working late?
I can't believe she came home the second I finally turned the game on...

name: Hasaki
message: "Is that a game?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's rare..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki... weren't you supposed to be working late?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh... Well, it was a special job, so it didn't take long. We finished up sooner than I expected."
A special job?
Not like it matters to me, I guess...

name: Hasaki
message: "And why are you eating that?"
Hasaki grumpily sat behind me.

name: Hasaki
message: "What about the lunch I packed?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I ate it, but I was still hungry afterward."

name: Hasaki
message: "But I bought ingredients and hurried home just so I could make you dinner..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You told me you wouldn't be home until later."

name: Hasaki
message: "I said I might not be home until later. I never said I definitely wouldn't... Isn't it awfully early to be eating cup ramen?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I just got hungry is all..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm... Really?"
Ah... what a pain...
I started talking less and focused on the game instead of Hasaki.

name: Hasaki
message: "So... what kind of game is it?"
How long is she planning on sticking around?
The conversation is over. Shouldn't she go back to her room or something?
I suppose I could stop playing...
No, then she would probably just complain.
Damn it... I always make sure not to play video games around her because I don't want to get involved with her...
Why is she going out of her way to sit here with me?
...Hmph.
What should I do now?
I'm sure Hasaki will be pissed if I tell her to get out.
Hasaki never listens to any direct orders I give her. If anything, giving her orders has the opposite effect.
What would Yuki do in a situation like this?
Hmm...
Yuki would probably just ask Hasaki to play with her.
The other one...
The next person to come to mind was the person I hated most.
Mamiya Takuji...
He always does things to piss people off even if he doesn't intend to.
He would do something that Hasaki didn't like, or maybe he would just leave the room.
In this situation, does that mean... that I should learn from Mamiya Takuji's example?
That's it... The strongest gust of wind will fail to take off a person's coat, but the warmth of a sunny day will accomplish it easily.
In other words, I have to make her want to leave the room.
So I should say something to gross her out...
That could work.
What would make Hasaki upset?
Well, most women don't like it when you talk about sexual stuff...
Some kind of sexual harassment involving the game, perhaps.
Which leaves me with only one answer.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, are you ignoring me? What game are you playing?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, this is an eroge."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hm, an eroge... Wait, what?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you so surprised for? This is an eroge."

name: Hasaki
message: "Uh, wh-what do you mean, an eroge? Um..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. It's exactly what you're thinking."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, the eroge you're playing... What's it about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh... There's a mental patient who's deluded himself into believing he's a ninja keeping watch over his little sister, and he rapes the schizophrenic spy girl who shares the same room in the sanitorium with him. It's a game about the dream the spy girl sees while she's getting raped..."
I just made it up on the spot, so it probably sounded like nonsense...
But it doesn't really matter what it's about.

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Oh, really... Wow. That's way too complicated for me... It sounds interesting, though."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What's this scene about?"
I thought she would leave right away, but oddly enough, she stayed put.
What's her deal... Are kids these days just used to the oversaturation of sex in the media?
I thought Hasaki would be too embarrassed to talk about this kind of stuff... How annoying.
Well, I'll just make something up.

name: Tomosane
message: "The spy girl's pet bird, Red Baron, is about to drop a bomb on the enemy's secret base."

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Oh wow... S-So that's what eroge are like..."
I just ignored Hasaki and focused on the action.
Side-scrolling shooters usually have enemies scroll from right to left, but this one's different because they go left to right.
Also, it's not an eroge.
Though that should be really obvious.

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-The art is really cute..."
Well it's a game about birds flying planes... Of course it has cute art.
I just told her it was eroge to make her go away... Why is she still here?

name: Hasaki
message: "T-Tomo Nii-san, um, I-I didn't know you played games like this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I do."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, so did I miss the scene... about the guy who thinks he's a ninja spying on his little sister?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, uh, I just can't imagine that happening based on what's on screen, so... I thought I'd ask."
Of course you can't imagine it... I was lying when I said this shmup was an eroge.

name: Tomosane
message: "You can't imagine it, huh..."
I can't really imagine it, either.
An eroge, huh?
I haven't ever played one, so I wouldn't know.
I just said that part about his little sister to mess with Hasaki, but... A little sister?
Why would I say that? Even perverts wouldn't get turned on by their own sister... I mean, come on, it's your sister.
But wait... I do remember that Mamiya Takuji had a couple games with 'sister' in the title...
A game about locking up your sister... I think that was called 'Siskan,' and another one was called 'Sis Sky.' There were a lot of them.
Does that mean... there's a demand for games like that?
Which means... there really are perverts who get turned on by their little sisters...

name: Tomosane
message: "What a sad world we live in."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh, nothing."
Not like I care, but why is she still here?

name: Hasaki
message: "Do you play games like this one a lot?"
Why would I play a lot of eroge?!
I wanted to snap back at her, but...

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I hide them from you, but I play eroge every day."
I just said something... incredibly shameful.
Don't worry about it... This is just to put some space between me and Hasaki.
I need to keep a certain distance between us.
I'm going to disappear eventually.
If I become important to her, it'll only hurt her more when I disappear.
So I have to be hated... I have to be loathed by everyone I meet.
Even Hasaki has to hate me.
If Yuki is getting cut off from the world, then that means it won't be long before I disappear.
Hasaki has to forget me... and live on in a world without me.
She doesn't need any good memories of me to do that.
Yuuki Tomosane has to be a terrible person so that she doesn't grieve me when I'm gone...

name: Hasaki
message: "E-Every day?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, every single day... I like to play mindbreak games."

name: Hasaki
message: "Mindbreak?"
She was completely oblivious.
Hasaki probably doesn't know what I'm talking about... She probably just thinks it's like mind control or something.

name: Tomosane
message: "I like games where you can train your little sister..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Train?"
She was still oblivious.
That's right... People in normal society use the word 'train' when they're talking about animals or sports...

name: Hasaki
message: "You mean, like, teaching her how to do something?"
I guess you could say that...
No, that's not it.

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not what I mean... I told you, this is an eroge!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Eroge..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Wait, what does the 'ge' mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's short for game."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, okay... That makes sense."
What did you think the 'ge' stood for before?

name: Hasaki
message: Oh, uh, I should've been able to figure that out...
So what do you do to your little sister in that game?"
Hasaki was definitely wavering.
This is my chance... I just have to keep saying things that will creep her out.
Grr...
I'd like to, but... this is kind of hard.
I don't really know much about eroge either. I guess there's sex, since it has 'ero' in the abbreviation, but I don't really know what that has to do with training.

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, Tomo Nii-san?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's ero, so they do erotic stuff..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You mean... they... have sex?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. They do all sorts of perverted stuff!"

name: Hasaki
message: "P-Perverted?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, perverted. Perverted stuff means sex in this case..."

name: Hasaki
message: "R-Really?"
Good job, Hasaki... Wait, why is Hasaki leading the conversation?
Hasaki's downturned face was bright red.
Okay, she's embarrassed, but why isn't she leaving? I can't stand this awkwardness for much longer.

name: Tomosane
message: "The sex scene is coming up..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "The sex scene is coming up, so go away."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, y-you mean..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I hope I don't need to explain that too..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Why don't you go and do that in your room?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "There's no console in my room."

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Okay, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So get out..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Um, you said there was a sex scene soon, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right..."

name: Hasaki
message: "If you don't mind... I might wanna watch it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, um, well, I've never seen a game like that before... If you like those games, then I want to see it too."

name: Hasaki
message: "Uh, not in a weird way. Y-You don't really talk about yourself, so I always wonder what you're interested in..."

name: Hasaki
message: "So I wish I could understand you better, Tomo Nii-san... And this is the first time I've seen you so focused on something..."
What's... happening?
It's not going like I expected it to...
If everything had gone as planned, by now Hasaki would have yelled, "Tomosane-san, you perv! I hate you!" Or maybe she would've looked shocked and said, "Uh, I'll leave you to your games..."
Why is she acting like this?

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Tomo Nii-san... why aren't you saying anything? U-Uh..."
Haa...
I turned around and looked at Hasaki.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wha―!"
Why is she blushing? And why are there also tears in her eyes?
If she hates it that much, she should just leave.

name: Tomosane
message: "You know, Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Y-Yes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Doesn't it feel like you're missing something here?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Wh-What? I'm missing something?"
Of course you are... What on earth do you think I've been talking about?
Everything's getting complicated now...

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you to leave because there's a sex scene coming up. There's something very important I have to do."

name: Hasaki
message: "Something important?"
Damn it... She's totally oblivious.

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-That's okay. No matter what happens... Yeah."
No matter what?
What's her problem? She's trying to act casual even while her cheeks are burning red.

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-This is the living room, so I can be here if I want."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't show a little kid something like that..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I'm not a little kid! I'm an adult!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What definition of adult are you using?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Who cares about the definition?! I hate how you always treat me like a kid."

name: Tomosane
message: "If you don't like it, then go away... There's no reason for you to stay here."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's for me to decide... Don't tell me what to do. A-Anyway, just keep going. I don't mind, really..."
Haa...
Now she's just being stubborn. I guess I can't keep up the act any longer.
Seems like she's gonna stay no matter what.

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But... I'm surprised there are games with sex scenes on consoles."

name: Tomosane
message: "There aren't."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "This is a television, and I'm playing on a game console... Eroge are only on the PC."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's no way they could sell eroge for a console..."

name: Hasaki
message: "What?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I just said all that stuff about porn because you were annoying me."

name: Hasaki
message: "There you go again..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Fine! I guess you really hate being around me, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Pretty much."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, you JEEERRKKK!"
Hasaki pulled her hand back as far as she could...
And then brought it down instantly.

name: Tomosane
message: "Aaaaaahh!!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Dammit! Why did you hit the power button?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Jerk!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What the hell?! I can't save in a shmup, you know?!"
I expected her to slap me or something... I never thought she would hit the power button.
What a bummer...
